description_long: This is a compact, single-story convenience store with a flat, gray roof and a boxy, utilitarian structure. The front facade features a prominent illuminated sign with Japanese and English text, as well as a main entrance door with a digital display above it. The exterior walls are primarily light gray with subtle beige accents, and there are decorative panels and signage on multiple sides, including graffiti-style art and a small service window. The building appears to be constructed mainly from concrete or masonry, with some metal and glass elements for doors and signage. There are no large display windows, but the design includes functional and decorative details typical of urban commercial buildings. The overall appearance is modern and slightly futuristic, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, boxy convenience store with a flat roof, illuminated signage, and minimalistic urban design details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a digital sign above the door and a large illuminated storefront sign with Japanese and English text.
description_view_1: The rear view is plain, featuring a solid wall with no windows, doors, or signage.
description_view_2: The side view displays the main entrance door with a small digital sign above it and no additional windows or signage.
description_view_3: The opposite side features a small service window and a rounded wall section with graffiti-style art and a green slogan.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large illuminated sign with Japanese and English text ('TIGER BOARD' and Japanese characters) in purple, white, and black, mounted above the main entrance; digital display above the door with blue and orange text.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: None; the main entrance door appears to be solid with no visible glass panels.
attribute_display_windows: None; no large display windows are present on any side of the building.
attribute_exterior_lighting_fixtures: None; no exterior lighting fixtures are visible on the building.
